title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at SRL Diagnostics

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at SRL Diagnostics
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? SRL Diagnostics in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SRL Diagnostics:
SRL Diagnostics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRL Diagnostics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
